ttd-fix-bug.description: TDD bug-fix workflow with reproduction, failing test, bounded fix/test loop, review, and optional full tests
documentation: required gate before add failing test:
repeat up to 3 times until pass: focused tests:
ttd-fix-bug.normalized: inspect report -> (reproduce bug !> add failing test) -> ((fix implementation -> focused tests) *3 until pass: focused tests) -> (review diff ?> (full tests ~> summarize))
ttd-fix-bug.workflow: inspect report -> (reproduce bug !> add failing test) -> ((fix implementation -> focused tests) *3 until pass: focused tests) -> (review diff ?> (full tests ~> summarize))
